name: Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter or margarine in a skillet.
2. Brown 1 cup chopped onion and 4 cups sliced zucchini for about 10 minutes.
3. Turn off the skillet. Add basil, oregano, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Whip together 2 eggs and 1 cup shredded Mozzarella and 1 cup shredded Muenster cheese.
5. Add the egg mixture to the zucchini.
6. Place in a prepared pie crust.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 18-20 minutes.
